item.title: Canva acquires startups working on animation and marketing
item.description: With the new acquisitions, the company wants to bolster its position as a marketing solution by potentially adding video creation and more granular me...

item.title: Stripe, PayPal Ventures bet on India’s Xflow to fix cross-border B2B payments
item.description: Stripe and PayPal Ventures have participated in Xflow's $16.6 million round that gives it a post-money valuation of $85 million.

item.title: A Meta AI security researcher said an OpenClaw agent ran amok on her inbox
item.description: The viral X post from an AI security researcher reads like satire. But it's really a word of warning about what can go wrong when handing tasks to an ...

item.title: Tesla’s battle with the California Department of Motor Vehicles isn’t over after all
item.description: Tesla has filed a lawsuit against the California DMV in the ongoing battle around Autopilot.

item.title: With AI, investor loyalty is (almost) dead: At least a dozen OpenAI VCs now also back Anthropic
item.description: While some dual investors are understandable, others were more shocking, and signal the disregard of a longstanding ethical conflict-of-interest rule.
